ddls:
CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the cryptocurrency was created */,
  "smart_contract_address" TEXT /* Smart contract address for the cryptocurrency */,
  "blockchain" TEXT /* Blockchain on which the cryptocurrency operates */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Official website URL of the cryptocurrency */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* URL to the whitepaper of the cryptocurrency */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the logo of the cryptocurrency */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the cryptocurrency is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency associated with this market data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Exact time of the market data entry */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency on this date */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from previous day */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency on this date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency on this date */,
  "volume" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume_usd" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume in USD */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency on this date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency on this date */,
  "supply" INTEGER /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "trading_pairs" TEXT /* JSON array of trading pairs */,
  "source_exchange" TEXT /* Name of the exchange where the data was sourced from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markets_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency associated with this indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g., RSI, MACD) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technical indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the technical indicator was calculated */,
  "time" TEXT /* Exact time when the technical indicator was calculated */,
  "indicator_period" INTEGER /* Period over which the indicator was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, investor) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., price alert, news update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency associated with the alert */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value of the alert (e.g., price threshold) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the alert should be checked (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "alert_duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the alert should be active */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, disabled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who requested the API key */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key issued to the user */,
  "api_key_type" TEXT /* Type of API key (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the API key expires */,
  "is_revoked" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the API key has been revoked */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date and time when the API key was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developer_applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer application */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who developed the application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "app_description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the application was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the application was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., active, under review, disabled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developer_applications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_api_keys" (
  "app_api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application-API key association */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application associated with the API key */,
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API key associated with the application */,
  "date_associated" TEXT /* Date when the API key was associated with the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_api_keys_api_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("api_key_id") REFERENCES api_keys ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_api_keys_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES developer_applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data associated with the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was created */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the comment is public or private */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the comment has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_comments_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
